# Ingredients

 \normalsize


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[[1]]
[1] "14 oz Thai stir fry noodles"                
[2] "2 limes"                                    
[3] "2 tablespoons tamari (or regular soy sauce)"
[4] "1/4 cup sweet and sour sauce"               
[5] "2 bell peppers"                             
[6] "4 garlic cloves"                            
[7] "1 package extra-firm tofu"                  
[8] "1/4 cup roasted peanuts"                    
[9] "2 eggs"                                     

[[2]]
 [1] "1 lb chicken thighs or extra firm tofu"         
 [2] "10 oz bag of frozen corn"                       
 [3] "1 cup brown rice"                               
 [4] "1/2 cup quinoa"                                 
 [5] "1 can of black beans"                           
 [6] "1/2 cup shredded cheddar jack or Mexican cheese"
 [7] "Cholula Cilantro Lime Cremosa Sauce"            
 [8] "2 roma tomatoes"                                
 [9] "1 lime, quartered"                              
[10] "0.5 oz fresh cilantro"                          

[[3]]
[1] "1 pound tri-color spiral pasta"                               
[2] "16-oz pre-cut crisp lettuce (e.g., romaine, baby butter leaf)"
[3] "12 ounces grape tomatoes"                                     
[4] "1.5 cups shredded cheddar cheese"                             
[5] "1 pound of thick cut bacon"                                   
[6] "1 jar of ranch dressing"                                      

[[4]]
[1] "1.5 cups flour"                        
[2] "0.75 cups sugar"                       
[3] "2 tsp baking powder"                   
[4] "1/4 tsp salt"                          
[5] "1/3 cup avocado oil"                   
[6] "1 large egg"                           
[7] "1/3 cup milk"                          
[8] "2 teaspoons vanilla extract"           
[9] "1 cup blueberries (any berry can work)"
```


:::
:::


 \normalsize

\newpage

# Recipe One

 \normalsize

![ Pad Thai ]( website/images/PadThai.jpg ){width=50%}

 \normalsize

 \normalsize


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "14 oz Thai stir fry noodles"                
[2] "2 limes"                                    
[3] "2 tablespoons tamari (or regular soy sauce)"
[4] "1/4 cup sweet and sour sauce"               
[5] "2 bell peppers"                             
[6] "4 garlic cloves"                            
[7] "1 package extra-firm tofu"                  
[8] "1/4 cup roasted peanuts"                    
[9] "2 eggs"                                     
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
 [1] "Boil Thai noodles according to package instructions. Rince under cold water and coat with oil."                                          
 [2] "Drain tofu, cut into bite-sized pieces, and season with salt and pepper."                                                                
 [3] "Thinly slice peppers, mince garlic, chop peanuts."                                                                                       
 [4] "Squeeze 2 tablespoons lime juice into a small bowl. Mix in tamari and sweet and sour sauce."                                             
 [5] "Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Cook tofu until golden brown (5-10 minutes). Move to a paper towel lined plate."              
 [6] "In the same pan, add oil and cook bell peppers until tender. Add to the plate with the tofu."                                            
 [7] "In the same pan, add oil and garlic. Cook 1-2 minutes until browned."                                                                    
 [8] "Add noodles and sauce and cook about 3-5 minutes, until noodles absorb some sauce."                                                      
 [9] "Move noodles to one side of the pan. Add a little oil and two eggs. Scramble the eggs until almost set, then stir them into the noodles."
[10] "Mix in tofu, peppers, and peanuts."                                                                                                      
[11] "Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve with lime wedges."                                                                           
```


:::
:::


 \normalsize

\newpage

# Recipe Two

 \normalsize

![ Latin Bowl (Serves 4) ]( website/images/LatinBowl.jpg ){width=50%}

 \normalsize

 \normalsize


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
 [1] "1 lb chicken thighs or extra firm tofu"         
 [2] "10 oz bag of frozen corn"                       
 [3] "1 cup brown rice"                               
 [4] "1/2 cup quinoa"                                 
 [5] "1 can of black beans"                           
 [6] "1/2 cup shredded cheddar jack or Mexican cheese"
 [7] "Cholula Cilantro Lime Cremosa Sauce"            
 [8] "2 roma tomatoes"                                
 [9] "1 lime, quartered"                              
[10] "0.5 oz fresh cilantro"                          
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "Add brown rice and quinoa to 3 cups of salted water, bring to a boil, reduce to simmer for 15-20 minutes. When done, mix in lime zest, juice from one lime wedge, salt and pepper."
[2] "Dice roma tomatoes, zest and quarter lime, and roughly chop the fresh cilantro."                                                                                                   
[3] "Season chicken/tofy with salt and pepper. Cook chicken/tofu, transfer to cutting board, and cut into bite size pieces."                                                            
[4] "Drain and rinse black beans."                                                                                                                                                      
[5] "Cook corn and beans together in a frying pan. If you choose to microwave the corn, you can add beans to the rice-quinoa mix when it is almost done."                               
[6] "Add rice-quinoa mix into each bowl. Top with chicken, corn, beans, cheese, tomato, cilantro lime cremosa sauce, fresh cilantro, and a lime wedge."                                 
```


:::
:::


 \normalsize

\newpage

# Recipe Three

 \normalsize

![ BLT Salad (Serves 4) ]( website/images/BLTSalad.jpg ){width=50%}

 \normalsize

 \normalsize


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "1 pound tri-color spiral pasta"                               
[2] "16-oz pre-cut crisp lettuce (e.g., romaine, baby butter leaf)"
[3] "12 ounces grape tomatoes"                                     
[4] "1.5 cups shredded cheddar cheese"                             
[5] "1 pound of thick cut bacon"                                   
[6] "1 jar of ranch dressing"                                      
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "Prepare pasta according to package instructions."                             
[2] "Cook bacon to be crispy."                                                     
[3] "Refrigerate pasta and bacon until cold."                                      
[4] "Halve tomatoes and dice cooked bacon."                                        
[5] "Add lettuce, tomato, cheese, bacon, and dressing to taste in a bowl and toss."
```


:::
:::


 \normalsize

\newpage

# Breakfast Recipe

 \normalsize

![ Breakfast Muffins ]( website/images/BreakfastMuffins.jpg ){width=50%}

 \normalsize

 \normalsize


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "1.5 cups flour"                        
[2] "0.75 cups sugar"                       
[3] "2 tsp baking powder"                   
[4] "1/4 tsp salt"                          
[5] "1/3 cup avocado oil"                   
[6] "1 large egg"                           
[7] "1/3 cup milk"                          
[8] "2 teaspoons vanilla extract"           
[9] "1 cup blueberries (any berry can work)"
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "Preheat oven to 400 degrees and grease muffin pan."                                                                                      
[2] "Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl."                                                                            
[3] "Whisk avocado oil, egg, milk, and vanilla in a medium bowl."                                                                             
[4] "Mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and then gently stir in the berries."                                                   
[5] "Divide the batter between muffin cups and bake 15-20 minutes, until the internal temperature reaches 207 or a toothpick comes out clean."
```


:::
:::


 \normalsize
